Dialog.name: SYS_PERSONA_DROP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you sure you want to release {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_PERSONA_DROP_NG
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You cannot release a Persona that is currently equipped.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_PERSONA_SET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Equip this Persona?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_PERSONA_EQUIPED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27} is already equipped.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SKILL_FULL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This Persona cannot learn any more skills. Please choose one to forget.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SKILLCARD_ALREADY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27} has already been learned.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_REMEMBER_CONF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you sure you want to exit?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_NO_EFFECT_INCENSE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The limit has already been reached.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SYSTEM_BACK_TO_TITLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Return to the title screen?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TITL_USE_NETWORK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}This game supports online features when connected to the network. Would you like to enable these features now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TITL_DONT_USE_NETWOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network functionality has been turned {f 0 1 2}OFF{f 0 1 27}. You can change this at any time from the Config menu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_LOAD_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Load this save data?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_LOAD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Loading network save data...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_LOAD_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network save data has been successfully loaded.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_LOAD_ER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network save data could not be loaded.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_UP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Uploading save data...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_UP_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Save data has been successfully uploaded.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_UP_ERRO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Save data could not be uploaded.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_BROKEN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network save data is corrupted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_INVALID
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network functionality is currently disabled. You can change this setting from the Config menu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NETWORK_NOTEXIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is no save data on the network.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_OVERWRITE_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Save data already exists. Do you want to overwrite this data?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_ROLLBACK_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you return to this point, any more recent rewind data will be lost. Continue?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_CLOSE_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exit without applying changes?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_DIFF_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you change the difficulty from Merciless, you won't be able to change it back. Are you sure you want to proceed?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_DIFF_CHANGED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The difficulty level has been changed to {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_CONNECT_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network connection failed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_CONNECTING
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Connecting to the network...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_PARTY_MEMBEROVER_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are {f 2 4 0} member(s) over max party size.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Begin the game at {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27} difficulty?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_DESC_SAFE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For players who want to focus on the story.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_DESC_EASY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For casual players.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_DESC_NORM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For experienced players.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_DESC_HARD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For players who enjoy strategizing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_DESC_LUNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For highly advanced players.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_SAFE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your party auto-revives after defeat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Merciless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_EASY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Low-stress combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Merciless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_NORM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Moderately challenging combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Merciless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_HARD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Significantly challenging combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Merciless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_LUNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exceedingly challenging combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time, but you cannot return to Merciless once leaving it.{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SKILL_NOT_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}[[Not used]] {f 2 4 2} gave a sharp cry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_NETWORK_CONNECT_YES
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network functionality has been turned {f 0 1 2}ON{f 0 1 27}. You can change this at any time from the Config menu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_NETWORK_VOICE_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Network error. Please check your connection.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SKILL_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh...? A skill seems to be on the verge of changing... Will you see this through?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_PARTY_FIXED_MEMBER_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 2 4 0} must be in your party.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_RECHECK_BACK_TO_TITL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will lose all progress made from the last time you saved up to this point. Are you sure you want to return to the title screen?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GAMEDATA_INSTALL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Installing game data...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GAMEDATA_INSTALL_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Installation complete.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ACTIVITY_DATA_NOT_MA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The selected activity did not match the state of the latest save data. The game will start normally.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_ASSIGN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enter a key to bind to {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27}. Press Esc to return to the settings menu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_OVERWRITE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is a conflict with the following key binding: {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 0}{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 5 0}Overwrite the existing key binding?[n]{f 1 5 0}{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_FINISH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Finish with current settings?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_NOT_SET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Some configurations have not been set.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_RESET_KEYB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Restore keyboard configuration to default settings?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_RESET_MOUS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Restore mouse configuration to default settings?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_KEYCONFIG_RESET_GAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Restore gamepad configuration to default settings?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_DISPLAY_CHECK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Display settings have been adjusted. Do you wish to keep these changes? (Settings will revert in {f 2 4 0} seconds.)[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_INPUT_DEVICE_LOST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A device was disconnected. Please check the status of the connection.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_NO_SPACE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Save failed. Please check available system storage space.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_APP_QUIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exit the game?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_APPLY_INIT_NAME_STOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Due to a change in language settings, the protagonist's name will default to "Makoto Yuki." To restore the original name, the language must match the one that was set when the name was entered.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_APPLY_INIT_NAME_NETW
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Due to a change in language settings, the protagonist's name will default to "Makoto Yuki." To restore the original name, the language must match the one that was set when the name was entered.[n]{f 1 1}
